title: Just A Structure Mod
description: Have you often noticed that Minecraft is "empty"? This Mod solves this problem! You will find both structures that complement the world, as well as Real Dungeons with Challenges for the most Stubborn
body:
# About Just a Structure 
Various buildings will begin to appear in your world, from small ones, such as fallen trees and boulders, to really ****HUGE**** ones, such as Towers of parts of the world, Palaces and Castles, and the like. Also, a powerful and unique loot, ****a Sword for Sharpness 6**** or ****a Pickaxe for Luck 4****? How lucky! And more new achievements :D 

## All Structures and Dungeons 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
1. Fallen Tres (except for Nether)
2. Boulder 
3. Ice Boulder
4. Field 
5. Big Field 
6. Small Pyramid 
7. Tents (all colours)
8. Well 
9. Moai 
10. Stump 
11. Dried Tree
</details>

### You can join to my Discord Server for more information!
[Discrod Server](https://discord.com/invite/wXQvD64VQq)
